titel: Have you been contacted by Demoskop to participate in a survey?
html:
Please ensure you are using a recommended web browser. If this is already the case, please try visiting us again in a few minutes.

May 12, 2026 | News

The Swedish Pensions Agency has commissioned the research company Demoskop to contact a random sample of individuals. The purpose of these surveys is to assess how we at the Pensions Agency can improve our processes, customer service, and overall support.

Demoskop will be contacting individuals who have applied for old-age pensions, housing supplements, or survivor's pensions in recent months. If you belong to one of these groups, you may receive a phone call, a postal letter, or a digital message via Kivra with a link to the survey. It takes approximately 10–15 minutes to complete.

Participation in the surveys is voluntary, but we would appreciate it if you choose to participate. Your responses are very valuable to us as they help us improve our operations. You will respond anonymously, and no one outside of the research team will be able to access your individual answers; only aggregated statistics will be used.

If you have any questions or comments about the survey, please contact the research company Demoskop at respondent@demoskop.se.
tldr: The Swedish Pensions Agency is conducting a survey to improve its services and may contact you if you have recently applied for a pension or housing allowance.
lattlast:
The Swedish Pensions Agency wants to understand how it can improve its services and provide better assistance. To achieve this, they have hired a company called Demoskop to conduct a survey among individuals who have recently applied for a pension or housing allowance.

You may be contacted by phone, mail, or digitally via Kivra. If you choose to participate, answering the questions will take approximately 10 to 15 minutes. Your responses are completely anonymous, meaning that no one can see who provided which answers.

Participation in the survey is entirely voluntary, but your input is valuable in helping the agency improve its services. If you have any questions about the survey itself, please contact Demoskop directly via their email address.
